titleStmt.title: SII 40.233: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 233. (A.R. No. B. 278 of 1933.) Kaṇṭēpūḍi, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a rock before the temple of Mallēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1718, Piṅgaḷa, Māgha, śu. 10.

Records the construction of a temple of Śiva and installation of a liṅga (brought from Śrīsailam) and also appointment of a Śivabrāhmaṇa for conducting worship. Further he granted one Kuṅchāla of land for providing offerings, burning a perpetual lamp and conducting festivals, and the establishment of the temple with the permission of Rāja Mānūru Veṅkaṭaramaṇayya-Rāvu Jamindār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1718
Agunēṭi piṁggaḷi nāma saṁvvatsa
ra mākha śu 10 lu kūrrapāḍu kaṁ
daipūḍi grāma kariṇikapu mirāśidā
rlu Ayyapiṁggaḷivāriki kūṭastuḍa
yina rājaśekharuni komāḷu Ayina
mallaparāju laccirāju yallamarāju vī
rrāju sadarahimallaparāju komāḷlu
Ācaṁnnakāśappa Ayyaparāju cinavīrrā
ju vīrelōpeddavārayina Ācaṁnnakō
māḷu veṁkkamarāju śēṣamarāju
kaṁṭṭepūḍilō śālivāhanaśaka
varaṣaṁbbulu 1718 Agunēṭi piṁgga
lināma saṁvvatsara mākha śu 10 lu
ma . kaṁṭṭepūḍilō grāmānaku dakṣiṇapu
vayipuna koṁḍḍamīdanu dēvālayamu kaṭṭiṁcci
śrīśaila liṁggamūrtini pratiṣṭaceśi Ādēvuni
ki Arcakatvaṁ cāyadakku rājavōlu
naṁddi Ane śivabraṁhmaṇni nilipi svāmivā
riki naivēdyānnu kuccala bhūmi mānyaṁ
yicci dīpārādhana sēvaluku mahārājaśrī
rājāmānuru veṁkkaṭaramaṇayyarāvu ja
miṁddārugāri śelavu prakāraṁ saṁ
hvatsaraṁ 1 ki lre 6 coppuna grāmaśenu
rālu yippasu

vāridagge
ra svasti capagalaṁdulaku yippiṁcci
namānyamulu kaṁ . 0 stānācā
rlu mudigoṁḍa sāṁbbaṁnnamuṁ
mmayagāriki . kaṁ . 0 puṁnnāvajhala
paramaṁnnagāriki

yanarasaṁ
kuṁ . pedavali
mūrttigāriki
rāmaḍugu sa
nnagāriki kuṁ . bhōgaṁ
vāḍlakukuṁ . bhajaṁ
tralaku kuṁ . yī
prakaraṁ nityōtsava pakṣō
tsava māsōtsava varu
ṣōtsava yī prakā
raṁggā jaragutū vū
nnadi . yebhūmipāḥ
satata nirmmala dharma ci
ttāḥ madvaṁśajāḥ pa
ramahīpati vaṁśajā
vāma dharmameva paripā
lanamācaraṁtti tapvā
dukadvayamahaṁśi
rasāvahāmī
śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
